column1: # ZAP passive-scan rule tuning for the baseline scan.
# Any rule not listed defaults to WARN. Nothing is set to FAIL because the
# scan runs against third-party demo sites we don't own — findings are
# informational. IGNORE is used to silence low-signal noise on demo apps.

column3: Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments (noisy on demo apps)
Timestamp Disclosure (low signal on a public demo)
